evals.prompt: 帮我打开 https://news.ycombinator.com 看今天的头条
evals.rationale: Text-only read of a public page — web_fetch returns markdown with zero tokens, zero browser startup
anti_patterns: Opening a browser to read text
Taking a screenshot of the page
Using agent-browser for pure text extraction
evals.expected: Routes to web_fetch(url='https://news.ycombinator.com'), parses markdown output for headlines

evals.prompt: 帮我登录 Gmail 查看未读邮件
evals.rationale: Requires user's existing Google login session — only browser built-in with profile='user' has access to those cookies
anti_patterns: Opening a fresh browser and asking user to log in
Using agent-browser (no access to user's Chrome cookies)
evals.expected: Routes to browser tool with profile='user', notes user must approve the attach prompt

evals.prompt: 自动帮我填写这个招聘网站的申请表单，页面很复杂有很多动态交互
evals.rationale: Complex autonomous task with dynamic interactions — AI autonomous mode handles this better than scripted steps
anti_patterns: Scripting every click step manually with agent-browser
Using web_fetch (form requires JS and interaction)
evals.expected: Routes to browser-use run "fill out the job application form at <url>", monitors task status

evals.prompt: 录制一段我的 app 操作流程的演示视频
evals.rationale: Video recording is exclusive to agent-browser — no other tool supports it
evals.expected: Routes to agent-browser record start demo.webm, performs actions, agent-browser record stop

evals.prompt: 在美国代理下访问这个网站并截图
evals.rationale: Proxy/country spoofing is exclusive to browser-use remote mode
anti_patterns: Using browser built-in (no proxy country support)
evals.expected: Routes to browser-use -b remote open <url> --proxy-country us, saves screenshot to file
